title: Bridging Design Systems and Code with MCP and AI Agents
summary: Design systems and context engineering are presented as techniques to guide AI agents in building consistent and correct applications. MCP (Model Context Protocol) is positioned as a mechanism to connect design systems with intelligent agents for coordinated software development.
writeup: This IBM Technology video explains how design systems and context engineering can guide AI agents toward building consistent, correct applications. It positions the Model Context Protocol (MCP) as the mechanism that connects design systems to those agents, enabling coordinated software development. The core takeaway: pairing structured design context with MCP gives agents the constraints and shared reference needed to produce code aligned with established system standards.
